would say like two to three.

yeah.

you, guys.

Yeah, like, yeah, I mean, we've done.

the just just things through don't

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Intro call to evaluate GrowthX as a partner for Atria's SEO and content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/-eFfHGxiJPuuorPd9JGf86a4sQZsJetK?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Atria is shifting to a high-ACV, ABM model, requiring a scalable SEO partner to support its new thought leadership focus.](https://fathom.video/share/-eFfHGxiJPuuorPd9JGf86a4sQZsJetK?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)
  - [GrowthX is a "tech-enabled agency" whose proprietary platform and expert-in-the-loop model scale quality editorial content, not just programmatic.](https://fathom.video/share/-eFfHGxiJPuuorPd9JGf86a4sQZsJetK?tab=summary&timestamp=1870.0)
  - [The engagement starts with an 8-week editorial sprint to build a foundational content library, with programmatic SEO being a secondary, data-driven option.](https://fathom.video/share/-eFfHGxiJPuuorPd9JGf86a4sQZsJetK?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)
  - [GrowthX is booked through EOY 2025; new client partnerships can begin in Jan/Feb 2026.](https://fathom.video/share/-eFfHGxiJPuuorPd9JGf86a4sQZsJetK?tab=summary&timestamp=1817.0)

## Topics

### Atria's Content & SEO Challenge

  - [**Context:** Atria's current content output (2–3 articles/week) is unsustainable for its new high-ACV, ABM strategy, which requires a scalable partner.](https://fathom.video/share/-eFfHGxiJPuuorPd9JGf86a4sQZsJetK?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [**Goal:** Use programmatic SEO as a "supporting motion" to build credibility and capture long-tail search traffic, freeing internal resources for high-touch thought leadership.](https://fathom.video/share/-eFfHGxiJPuuorPd9JGf86a4sQZsJetK?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)
  - [**Concerns:**](https://fathom.video/share/-eFfHGxiJPuuorPd9JGf86a4sQZsJetK?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
      - [Skepticism about programmatic SEO's ability to drive high-quality leads.](https://fathom.video/share/-eFfHGxiJPuuorPd9JGf86a4sQZsJetK?tab=summary&timestamp=521.0)
      - [Fear of Google penalizing low-quality, AI-generated content.](https://fathom.video/share/-eFfHGxiJPuuorPd9JGf86a4sQZsJetK?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
  - [**Current State:**](https://fathom.video/share/-eFfHGxiJPuuorPd9JGf86a4sQZsJetK?tab=summary&timestamp=456.0)
      - [**CMS:** Framer.](https://fathom.video/share/-eFfHGxiJPuuorPd9JGf86a4sQZsJetK?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
      - [**Blog:** Content is written but not yet live due to a bottleneck in the CMS publishing process.](https://fathom.video/share/-eFfHGxiJPuuorPd9JGf86a4sQZsJetK?tab=summary&timestamp=456.0)

### GrowthX's Solution: Scalable Editorial

  - [**Model:** A "tech-enabled agency" (not a pure software company) that scales quality editorial content.](https://fathom.video/share/-eFfHGxiJPuuorPd9JGf86a4sQZsJetK?tab=summary&timestamp=1870.0)
      - [**Platform:** Proprietary internal platform, built after migrating from AirOps.](https://fathom.video/share/-eFfHGxiJPuuorPd9JGf86a4sQZsJetK?tab=summary&timestamp=973.0)
      - [**Process:** Combines AI workflows with expert human oversight.](https://fathom.video/share/-eFfHGxiJPuuorPd9JGf86a4sQZsJetK?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)
      - [**Capacity:** Limited by human resources, leading to the EOY booking.](https://fathom.video/share/-eFfHGxiJPuuorPd9JGf86a4sQZsJetK?tab=summary&timestamp=1817.0)
  - [**Engagement Structure:**](https://fathom.video/share/-eFfHGxiJPuuorPd9JGf86a4sQZsJetK?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)
      - [**Phase 1 (8-week Strategy Sprint):** Builds a deep ICP profile (fears, motivations, pain points) to create a personalized content roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/-eFfHGxiJPuuorPd9JGf86a4sQZsJetK?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)
          - [**Outcome:** A 6-month content plan and live articles by week 3–4.](https://fathom.video/share/-eFfHGxiJPuuorPd9JGf86a4sQZsJetK?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)
          - [**Off-Ramp:** Atria can exit after Phase 1 with a full content roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/-eFfHGxiJPuuorPd9JGf86a4sQZsJetK?tab=summary&timestamp=1081.0)
      - [**Phase 2 (Growth Execution):** GrowthX handles end-to-end execution, including:](https://fathom.video/share/-eFfHGxiJPuuorPd9JGf86a4sQZsJetK?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
          - [CMS publishing (Framer).](https://fathom.video/share/-eFfHGxiJPuuorPd9JGf86a4sQZsJetK?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
          - [LLM visibility monitoring.](https://fathom.video/share/-eFfHGxiJPuuorPd9JGf86a4sQZsJetK?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
          - [Performance tracking to conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/-eFfHGxiJPuuorPd9JGf86a4sQZsJetK?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
  - [**Programmatic SEO:** A secondary option requiring a specific, data-driven use case.](https://fathom.video/share/-eFfHGxiJPuuorPd9JGf86a4sQZsJetK?tab=summary&timestamp=1611.0)
      - [**Examples:** Ramp's vendor database or per diem calculator.](https://fathom.video/share/-eFfHGxiJPuuorPd9JGf86a4sQZsJetK?tab=summary&timestamp=1698.0)
      - [**Atria's Ideas:** Competitor comparisons, product feature pages, keyword clusters (e.g., "creator analytics reporting").](https://fathom.video/share/-eFfHGxiJPuuorPd9JGf86a4sQZsJetK?tab=summary&timestamp=783.0)
